Your intelligent digital health companion designed to help you manage prescriptions, track blood pressure trends, receive AI-powered wellness plans, and take control of your long-term health with confidence.

User Satisfaction

Core Features

Chat. Scribe.

Conversation & Documentation Mode

Discuss symptoms, upload photos, receive AI treatment plans or connect with doctors. In Scribe mode, AI transcribes consultations and generates structured notes.

For Medical Professionals

Boost Efficiency & Accuracy

AI listens during consultations and generates clinical notes, ICD-10 codes, treatment suggestions and editable documents.

AI Validated by Doctors

Machine Learning Meets Medicine

Fine-tuned medical LLMs validated by professionals to ensure reliable treatment plans and recommendations.

Access for Everyone

Start with Our Free Plan

Get ten free questions per month. Upgrade anytime for additional questions or unlimited access.
